subject: Vados, Universe 6 angel attendant, standing in a combat-ready pose holding a long staff
description: A slender humanoid figure stands at center in a confident fighting stance, holding a long staff diagonally across the body. The figure has light-colored skin and pale hair pulled back, wearing a form-fitting outfit with teal and white tones and distinctive shoulder armor. The background erupts with purple and magenta energy swirls radiating outward behind the figure. The composition is a mid-shot portrait with strong backlighting from the energy aura. The overall palette is cool purple and teal with bright magenta highlights. The figure's expression and posture convey calm authority.
foreground: slender humanoid figure in teal-and-white outfit with shoulder guards, holding a long staff diagonally
background: swirling purple and magenta energy aura radiating outward
